## Review checklist

- [ ] Gate green locally (`./scripts/gate.sh` → `GATE: PASS`, or `npm run verify:ci`)
- [ ] New behaviour covered by offline tests (heavy deps faked; real-model tests `@slow`)
- [ ] No dead code, no `TODO`/`FIXME` in the diff
- [ ] Schema/contract changes backward-compatible with sibling repos
- [ ] Docstrings / types added or updated
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] `/security-review` run if touching `api/`, auth, AI-provider calls, uploads, or HTML rendering
